moduleTitle: Film Filing, Troubleshooting, and Density Measurement
cpSection: Film Quality and Manufacturing Processes Course 2.6-2.8

lessons.title: Film Filing and Storage of Processed Radiographs
objectives: Apply retention-life measurements and long-term storage requirements
Implement filing and separation techniques for archived radiographs

lessons.title: Unsatisfactory Radiographs: Causes and Cures
objectives: Diagnose high or insufficient density, high or low contrast, and poor definition
Identify and prevent fog, light leaks, and film artifacts
cp105Topics: FQ 2.7 Unsatisfactory radiographs - causes and cures

lessons.title: Film Density Measurement
objectives: Use step-wedge comparison films to estimate density
Operate and verify densitometers for quantitative density measurement
